name: Catch-up Deduction for Unamortized R&D

eligibility.description: Available for domestic R&D expenditures that were required to be capitalized under the previous IRC 174 rules for tax years 2022-2024.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to deduct the remaining unamortized balance of domestic R&D costs incurred between 2022 and 2024 in the first tax year after 2024.
